brief_notes: Covers the essential content of the data descriptor but in a notably more compressed format without the structured tables that organize the skill version. The DEB-IPM model description uses a numbered list which is readable but the paper lacks tables for input traits, validation sources, derived quantities, and dataset comparison. The technical validation results are presented in text form without the tabular organization that would aid quick reference. The known limitations are covered but briefly. Overall a functional but less polished version of the data descriptor.
